hero.subtitle: Smarter sales. Global culture. AI-driven strategy.

services.subtitle: Comprehensive consulting solutions tailored to scale your operations and future-proof your business.

sales.title: Sales Excellence
sales.desc: Elevate your sales force with advanced methodologies and high-impact negotiation training designed for modern markets.

growth.title: Strategic Growth
growth.desc: Data-driven business strategies that align your corporate vision with actionable, measurable outcomes.

culture.title: Cross-Cultural Communications
culture.desc: Bridge global divides with tailored communication training, ensuring your teams thrive in diverse, international environments.

ai.title: Enterprise AI Integration
ai.desc: Navigate the complex landscape of AI. We provide strategic consulting to seamlessly integrate artificial intelligence into your workflows.

The EU Artificial Intelligence Act (Article 4) legally mandates that all organisations deploying AI systems must ensure a sufficient level of AI literacy among their staff. Protect your enterprise from regulatory liability and empower your workforce to operate AI tools securely with our certified compliance programme.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.desc: Fulfill your legal obligations as an AI deployer under the EU AI Act, mitigating institutional risk and avoiding severe regulatory penalties.

literacy.title: AI Literacy Fundamentals
literacy.desc: Equip your teams with the essential knowledge to utilise tools like Copilot and ChatGPT safely, ensuring they understand prompt boundaries and hallucination risks.

risk.title: Corporate Risk Mitigation
risk.desc: Prevent sensitive data leaks and address the ethical, legal, and security implications of integrating generative AI into daily enterprise workflows.

card.title: Documented Compliance
card.desc: Receive formal certification of AI literacy training for your participating staff, satisfying EU regulatory audit requirements.

about.desc1: Stormberry A.S. was established to bridge the gap between visionary strategy and operational realities. With a deep foundation in high-stakes sales, cross-cultural dynamics, and advanced AI frameworks, we bring a uniquely multifaceted approach to consulting.
about.desc2: We understand that true transformation requires a holistic approach. By combining deep strategic insight with advanced technological capabilities, we empower our clients to build resilient, future-ready organizations.
about.languages: Global Consulting & Training available in: English, Norwegian, Portuguese and French.

contact.subtitle: Ready to transform your business strategy? Contact us to schedule an introductory consultation.

footer.desc: Smarter sales. Global culture. AI-driven strategy.
